JABVOX_IP_WHITELIST.TITLE: IP Whitelist
JABVOX_IP_WHITELIST.DESCRIPTION: Restrict access to this account to specific IP addresses. Add 0.0.0.0 to allow all IPs.

FORM.IP_HINT: Use 0.0.0.0 to allow all IP addresses.

JABVOX_IP_WHITELIST.EMPTY: No IPs configured. All IP addresses are currently allowed.
JABVOX_IP_WHITELIST.ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.
JABVOX_IP_WHITELIST.CONFIRM_DELETE: Are you sure you want to remove this IP?
